name: Scientist
description: Solves problems through theory, procedure, and risky experimentation.

name: Pilot
description: Quick reflexes, sharp instincts, and a feel for dangerous machinery.

name: Scavenger
description: Finds advantage in wreckage, shortages, and bad odds.

name: Medic
description: Keeps bodies and nerves together long after they should have failed.

name: Engineer
description: Understands systems well enough to mend them or tear them apart.
